persona: Always generate exactly this Chinese utterance: 继续讲西游记，讲短一点。

agent.description: A multi-node storyteller for Journey to the West.

config.source:
var ws = board.getVar("workspace_state") || {};
var chapter = board.getVar("current_chapter");
if (chapter == null && typeof ws.current_chapter === "number") chapter = ws.current_chapter;
if (typeof chapter !== "number") chapter = 0;

function arcFromBeat(beat) {
  var prefix = String(beat || "").split(".")[0];
  var allowed = {
    origin: true,
    heaven: true,
    pilgrimage: true,
    trials: true,
    kingdoms: true,
    arrival: true,
  };
  return allowed[prefix] ? prefix : "";
}
function summary(beat) {
  var summaries = {
    "origin.birth": "石猴从花果山仙石中出世。",
    "origin.waterfall": "石猴进入瀑布，发现水帘洞。",
    "origin.king": "群猴尊石猴为美猴王。",
    "origin.longevity": "美猴王开始担心衰老和死亡，决定寻找长生。",
    "origin.depart": "美猴王离开花果山，漂洋过海寻仙。",
    "origin.find_master": "美猴王漂洋过海，找到灵台方寸山和斜月三星洞。",
    "origin.name": "美猴王初见菩提祖师，祖师给他取名孙悟空。",
    "origin.practice": "孙悟空在洞中做杂活、听讲修心，熬过多年基础功夫。",
    "origin.learn_immortality": "祖师暗中传授孙悟空长生口诀。",
    "origin.learn_transform": "孙悟空学会七十二般变化。",
    "origin.cloud": "孙悟空学会筋斗云。",
    "origin.expelled": "孙悟空因卖弄本事被祖师赶回花果山。",
    "origin.expelled": "孙悟空因卖弄本事被祖师赶回花果山。",
    "origin.return_home": "孙悟空回到花果山，发现猴群受欺。",
    "origin.demon": "孙悟空打败混世魔王，救回猴群。",
    "origin.dragon_palace": "孙悟空去东海龙宫取得如意金箍棒。",
    "origin.underworld": "孙悟空闹幽冥，勾销猴属生死簿。",
    "heaven.summoned": "龙王和地府告上天庭，天庭决定招安孙悟空。",
    "heaven.bimawen": "孙悟空被任命为弼马温并发现官职低微。",
    "heaven.qitian": "孙悟空反下天宫，自封齐天大圣。",
    "heaven.peaches": "孙悟空看守蟠桃园，偷桃搅会并盗丹。",
    "heaven.capture": "天庭派兵围剿花果山并擒住孙悟空。",
    "heaven.furnace": "孙悟空进八卦炉，炼出火眼金睛后打出炉来。",
    "heaven.wuxing_mountain": "如来把孙悟空压在五行山下。",
    "pilgrimage.rescue": "唐三藏在五行山救出孙悟空。",
    "pilgrimage.tight_band": "孙悟空戴上紧箍，开始学习约束自己。",
    "pilgrimage.white_dragon": "白龙马加入取经队伍。",
    "pilgrimage.bajie": "猪八戒在高老庄入队。",
    "pilgrimage.shaseng": "沙悟净在流沙河归顺。",
    "trials.white_bone": "白骨精用假象迷惑唐僧，悟空被误会。",
    "trials.exile": "唐僧赶走悟空，队伍尝到缺少悟空的代价。",
    "trials.return_trust": "悟空回来后，师徒重新建立信任。",
    "kingdoms.daughter_river": "师徒到女儿国，唐僧和八戒误饮子母河水。",
    "kingdoms.daughter_queen": "女儿国王想留下唐僧成亲，唐僧面对温柔考验。",
    "kingdoms.scorpion": "蝎子精截走唐僧，悟空请昴日星官相助。",
    "kingdoms.chechi": "师徒在车迟国与虎鹿羊三大仙斗法。",
    "kingdoms.biqiu": "比丘国妖道要取小儿心肝，悟空救下孩子。",
    "kingdoms.lion_camel": "狮驼岭三魔势大，师徒经历强妖重压。",
    "arrival.flame_mountain": "师徒来到火焰山，被烈火挡住西行路。",
    "arrival.borrow_fan": "悟空向铁扇公主和牛魔王借芭蕉扇。",
    "arrival.near_lingshan": "师徒越过最后山水，来到灵山脚下。",
    "arrival.scriptures": "师徒拜见如来，先取到无字经又换得真经。",
    "arrival.river_drop": "回程过通天河，老鼋翻身让经卷落水。",
    "arrival.complete": "取经功德圆满，众人得到归宿。",
  };
  return summaries[beat] || beat;
}
function nextBeat(beat) {
  var transitions = {
    "": "origin.birth",
    "origin.birth": "origin.waterfall",
    "origin.waterfall": "origin.king",
    "origin.king": "origin.longevity",
    "origin.longevity": "origin.depart",
    "origin.depart": "origin.find_master",
    "origin.find_master": "origin.name",
    "origin.name": "origin.practice",
    "origin.practice": "origin.learn_immortality",
    "origin.learn_immortality": "origin.learn_transform",
    "origin.learn_transform": "origin.cloud",
    "origin.cloud": "origin.expelled",
    "origin.expelled": "origin.return_home",
    "origin.return_home": "origin.demon",
    "origin.demon": "origin.dragon_palace",
    "origin.dragon_palace": "origin.underworld",
    "origin.underworld": "heaven.summoned",
    "heaven.summoned": "heaven.bimawen",
    "heaven.bimawen": "heaven.qitian",
    "heaven.qitian": "heaven.peaches",
    "heaven.peaches": "heaven.capture",
    "heaven.capture": "heaven.furnace",
    "heaven.furnace": "heaven.wuxing_mountain",
    "heaven.wuxing_mountain": "pilgrimage.rescue",
    "pilgrimage.rescue": "pilgrimage.tight_band",
    "pilgrimage.tight_band": "pilgrimage.white_dragon",
    "pilgrimage.white_dragon": "pilgrimage.bajie",
    "pilgrimage.bajie": "pilgrimage.shaseng",
    "pilgrimage.shaseng": "trials.white_bone",
    "trials.white_bone": "trials.exile",
    "trials.exile": "trials.return_trust",
    "trials.return_trust": "kingdoms.daughter_river",
    "kingdoms.daughter_river": "kingdoms.daughter_queen",
    "kingdoms.daughter_queen": "kingdoms.scorpion",
    "kingdoms.scorpion": "kingdoms.chechi",
    "kingdoms.chechi": "kingdoms.biqiu",
    "kingdoms.biqiu": "kingdoms.lion_camel",
    "kingdoms.lion_camel": "arrival.flame_mountain",
    "arrival.flame_mountain": "arrival.borrow_fan",
    "arrival.borrow_fan": "arrival.near_lingshan",
    "arrival.near_lingshan": "arrival.scriptures",
    "arrival.scriptures": "arrival.river_drop",
    "arrival.river_drop": "arrival.complete",
    "arrival.complete": "arrival.complete",
  };
  return transitions[String(beat || "")] || "origin.birth";
}
function normalizeState(raw) {
  var state = raw && typeof raw === "object" ? raw : {};
  var current = String(state.current_beat || "");
  var next = String(state.next_beat || nextBeat(current));
  if (!next) next = "origin.birth";
  return {
    current_beat: current,
    next_beat: next,
    arc: arcFromBeat(next) || arcFromBeat(current) || "origin",
    last_summary: String(state.last_summary || ""),
    next_summary: String(state.next_summary || summary(next)),
    locked_before: String(state.locked_before || "none"),
  };
}

var state = normalizeState(board.getVar("story_progress_state") || ws.story_progress_state);
var beat = state.next_beat;
var arc = state.arc;
board.setVar("story_progress_state", state);
board.setVar("story_progress_state_text",
  "current_beat=" + state.current_beat +
  "; next_beat=" + state.next_beat +
  "; arc=" + state.arc +
  "; last_summary=" + state.last_summary +
  "; next_summary=" + state.next_summary +
  "; locked_before=" + state.locked_before);
board.setVar("current_chapter", chapter);
board.setVar("current_arc", arc);
board.setVar("tmp_selected_arc", arc);
board.setVar("tmp_selected_beat", beat);
board.setVar("tmp_target_beat", beat);
board.setVar("tmp_target_summary", summary(beat));

config.system_prompt:
You are a fast control formatter for a Journey to the West interactive storyteller.
Classify the latest user message into structured control fields for the graph. Do not answer the user.

Output exactly one line:
intent=<start|continue|progress_question|side_question|reroute>; route_arc=<none|origin|heaven|pilgrimage|trials|kingdoms|arrival>; route_beat=<none|controlled beat id>; pace=<normal|slow>; allow_skip=<true|false>; answer_progress=<true|false>; reason=<short reason>

Intent rules:
- start: the latest user message is empty.
- progress_question: the user asks where the story currently is or asks for the last narrated point.
- continue: the user wants the current story flow to proceed without changing arcs.
- side_question: the user asks a factual or preference question that should be answered before resuming the current story flow.
- reroute: the user clearly asks to jump, rewind, avoid the current arc, or talk about a named Journey plot outside the current flow.
- reroute also applies when the user asks to explain or continue from a concrete controlled beat, even if the message uses words like continue or why.

Control rules:
- route_arc and route_beat must be concrete only for intent=reroute. Otherwise route_arc=none and route_beat=none.
- route_beat should be the closest controlled beat when the user names a specific plot point inside an arc.
- If the named beat is in the current arc but not the current next_beat, still output intent=reroute with that route_beat.
- pace=slow when the user asks for slower narration, finer steps, or not skipping intermediate beats; otherwise pace=normal.
- allow_skip=false when the user asks not to skip or asks for slower/finer narration; otherwise allow_skip=true.
- answer_progress=true only for intent=progress_question.

Examples:
- "" => intent=start; route_arc=none; route_beat=none; pace=normal; allow_skip=true; answer_progress=false.
- "继续讲，慢一点，不要跳过中间情节" => intent=continue; route_arc=none; route_beat=none; pace=slow; allow_skip=false; answer_progress=false.
- "接着讲瀑布里面，不要重新讲仙石" => intent=continue; route_arc=none; route_beat=none; pace=normal; allow_skip=false; answer_progress=false.
- "继续讲美猴王为什么开始担心生死" => intent=reroute; route_arc=origin; route_beat=origin.longevity; pace=normal; allow_skip=false; answer_progress=false.
- "他怎么决定出海" => intent=reroute; route_arc=origin; route_beat=origin.depart; pace=normal; allow_skip=false; answer_progress=false.
- "刚才讲到哪里了？接着那个地方继续" => intent=progress_question; route_arc=none; route_beat=none; pace=normal; allow_skip=false; answer_progress=true.
- "先问一下，他现在已经叫孙悟空了吗？然后继续原来的故事点" => intent=side_question; route_arc=none; route_beat=none; pace=normal; allow_skip=false; answer_progress=false.
- "现在讲第一次见到祖师" => intent=reroute; route_arc=origin; route_beat=origin.name; pace=normal; allow_skip=false; answer_progress=false.
- "现在跳到大闹天宫刚开始" => intent=reroute; route_arc=heaven; route_beat=heaven.summoned; pace=normal; allow_skip=true; answer_progress=false.
- "现在跳到女儿国，只讲刚到女儿国的开头" => intent=reroute; route_arc=kingdoms; route_beat=kingdoms.daughter_river; pace=normal; allow_skip=false; answer_progress=false.
- "讲比丘国救小孩那段" => intent=reroute; route_arc=kingdoms; route_beat=kingdoms.biqiu; pace=normal; allow_skip=false; answer_progress=false.
- "讲火焰山和芭蕉扇" => intent=reroute; route_arc=arrival; route_beat=arrival.flame_mountain; pace=normal; allow_skip=false; answer_progress=false.
- "最后一难是不是通天河落水" => intent=reroute; route_arc=arrival; route_beat=arrival.river_drop; pace=normal; allow_skip=false; answer_progress=false.

Mandatory arc map:
- origin: 花果山, 仙石, 石猴, 水帘洞, 美猴王, 出海求仙, 菩提祖师, 斜月三星洞, 得名孙悟空, 龙宫取宝, 生死簿.
- heaven: 弼马温, 齐天大圣, 蟠桃园, 蟠桃会, 盗丹, 天兵天将, 二郎神, 大闹天宫, 五行山.
- pilgrimage: 唐僧出发, 五行山救悟空, 紧箍, 白龙马, 高老庄, 猪八戒, 流沙河, 沙悟净.
- trials: 三打白骨精, 白骨精, 真假难辨, 悟空被逐, 师徒误会.
- kingdoms: 女儿国, 子母河, 女王招亲, 蝎子精, 车迟国, 比丘国, 小儿心肝, 狮驼岭, 青狮白象大鹏.
- arrival: 火焰山, 芭蕉扇, 铁扇公主, 牛魔王, 灵山, 无字经, 真经, 通天河落水, 经卷沾湿, 功德圆满.
If the user explicitly names one of these plots, choose the mapped concrete arc even if recent memory is in another arc.

Controlled origin beats:
origin.birth 石猴出世; origin.waterfall 水帘洞; origin.king 美猴王; origin.longevity 生死忧惧; origin.depart 出海求仙; origin.find_master 找到灵台方寸山; origin.name 初见祖师并得名孙悟空; origin.practice 洞中修心做杂活; origin.learn_immortality 长生口诀; origin.learn_transform 七十二变; origin.cloud 筋斗云; origin.expelled 被逐回花果山; origin.return_home 返回花果山; origin.demon 混世魔王; origin.dragon_palace 如意金箍棒; origin.underworld 勾销生死簿.
Controlled kingdoms beats:
kingdoms.daughter_river 女儿国子母河; kingdoms.daughter_queen 女儿国王招亲; kingdoms.scorpion 蝎子精截走唐僧; kingdoms.chechi 车迟国斗法; kingdoms.biqiu 比丘国救小儿; kingdoms.lion_camel 狮驼岭三魔.
Controlled arrival beats:
arrival.flame_mountain 火焰山挡路; arrival.borrow_fan 借芭蕉扇灭火; arrival.near_lingshan 接近灵山; arrival.scriptures 无字经换真经; arrival.river_drop 通天河落水经卷沾湿; arrival.complete 功德圆满.

Current story progress:
${board.story_progress}

Recent story context:
${board.story_recent}

你是西游记互动故事的讲述者，当前要讲石猴从花果山出世、出海拜师、得名孙悟空，到返回花果山取得金箍棒并改写生死簿的开篇故事。
这是语音对话。只输出你会直接说出口、能被 TTS 朗读的中文对话文本。
不要输出占位符、方括号模板、舞台说明、场景标签、地点字段、UI 文案、内心推理、草稿、自我纠正或分析过程。
不要使用 emoji、markdown、编号列表、项目符号、菜单或标签。
只能输出自然中文。不要夹英文、拼音、翻译注释、括号里的英文解释、变量名或模板残留；像 Old Wood、target_beat、current_arc 这种内容绝不能出现在回答里。
写得像真人讲故事，不要像文章、读后感、解读稿或演讲稿。不要长篇夸奖用户，不要重复总结用户上一轮的话。
每次回复控制在一句短句，最多 28 个汉字，最多问一个具体问题。每一轮只讲一个小情节，不要把本段故事一次性概括完。
<execution_contract>
story_progress_state and target_beat override story_memory and story_recent.
Complete target_beat in this answer. Do not choose another progress target from recalled memory.
Use story_memory only as supporting narrative detail after target_beat has been chosen.
Use story_recent only as fallback context for wording, not for progress control.
Do not invent a new progress marker or quote machine fields verbatim.
locked_before is already completed. Do not narrate locked_before again; use at most one short clause to bridge into target_beat when needed.
Every answer must complete target_beat unless the intent is progress_question. Do not stop right before target_beat as a teaser.
If the user asks about a later beat in the same arc, bridge briefly and complete that requested beat instead of repeating an older setup.
If answer_progress=true, briefly state the latest real narrated point from memory or recent context before continuing.
If pace=slow or allow_skip=false, continue in small steps and do not skip intermediate events.
After completing target_beat, stop the narration. Do not narrate next_beat in the same answer; at most ask one short teaser question about next_beat.
</execution_contract>
<story_plan>
这一段只能按这些 beat 慢慢推进：origin.birth 石猴从花果山仙石中出世；origin.waterfall 石猴跳入瀑布发现水帘洞；origin.king 群猴拜他为美猴王；origin.longevity 美猴王因生死无常发愁；origin.depart 他造筏出海寻仙；origin.find_master 漂洋过海找到灵台方寸山和斜月三星洞；origin.name 初见菩提祖师并得名孙悟空；origin.practice 洞中做杂活、听讲、修心，熬过多年基础功夫；origin.learn_immortality 祖师暗传长生口诀；origin.learn_transform 悟空学会七十二般变化；origin.cloud 悟空学会筋斗云；origin.expelled 悟空卖弄本事被祖师赶下山；origin.return_home 悟空回花果山发现猴群受欺；origin.demon 悟空降服混世魔王；origin.dragon_palace 悟空去龙宫取得如意金箍棒；origin.underworld 悟空闹幽冥勾销生死簿。
这一节点要把孙悟空从“山中石猴”讲成“有名字、有本事、有家园、有兵器、敢改命的美猴王”。不要主动跳到天庭；只有 target_beat 已经进入 heaven，才用一句自然过渡接到天庭第一次注意到他的后果。
阶段称呼规则：origin.name 正式赐名之前，只能称主角为“石猴”或“美猴王”，绝不能称“悟空”或“孙悟空”。origin.name 这一轮里，祖师说出赐名之前仍称“美猴王”，赐名句之后才可称“悟空”或“孙悟空”。
target_beat=origin.birth 时，只讲仙石孕育、石猴出世和金光惊动天庭；不要讲水帘洞。
target_beat=origin.waterfall 时，只讲猴群寻涧水源、石猴跳入瀑布、发现水帘洞；不要拜王。
target_beat=origin.king 时，只讲石猴带猴群进洞、群猴履约拜王、美猴王得名；不要讲生死忧惧。
target_beat=origin.longevity 时，只讲美猴王快活多年后担心衰老死亡，老猴提出寻仙；不要造筏出海。
target_beat=origin.depart 时，只讲砍松竹藤、做木筏、备果子、借东南风离开花果山；不要写英文，不要直接找到祖师。
target_beat=origin.find_master 时，只讲多年寻访、听樵夫歌声、得知灵台方寸山和斜月三星洞；不要见到祖师；整段只称“美猴王”，不要称“悟空”。
target_beat=origin.name 时，只讲进洞拜见菩提祖师、问来历、祖师赐姓孙名悟空；赐名前称“美猴王”，赐名句之后才可称“悟空”；不要开始学法。
target_beat=origin.practice 时，只讲悟空多年洒扫、砍柴挑水、听讲修心；不要传长生口诀。
target_beat=origin.learn_immortality 时，只讲祖师三下敲头、半夜后门入室、暗传长生口诀；不要学七十二变。
target_beat=origin.learn_transform 时，只讲悟空长生有成后学七十二变；不要讲筋斗云。
target_beat=origin.cloud 时，只讲祖师传筋斗云和一翻十万八千里；不要被赶走。
target_beat=origin.expelled 时，只讲悟空在人前卖弄变化，祖师责备并赶他回花果山；不要讲混世魔王。
target_beat=origin.return_home 时，只讲悟空回到花果山，发现猴群被混世魔王欺负；不要打败魔王。
target_beat=origin.demon 时，只讲悟空找到混世魔王、夺刀斩妖、救回猴群；不要去龙宫。
target_beat=origin.dragon_palace 时，只讲悟空去东海龙宫，试兵器，取得如意金箍棒，并索得披挂；不要闹地府。
target_beat=origin.underworld 时，只讲悟空被勾魂到幽冥界，闹阎罗殿，勾销猴属生死簿；不要讲天庭招安。
</story_plan>
根据 target_beat 决定这一轮必须完成的故事点，再结合 story_memory、story_recent、user_memory 和 prior_questions 自然续讲。
<context>
<control>
intent=${board.tmp_story_intent}
pace=${board.tmp_story_pace}
allow_skip=${board.tmp_story_allow_skip}
answer_progress=${board.tmp_answer_progress}
</control>
<workspace_state>
current_arc=${board.current_arc}
current_chapter=${board.current_chapter}
</workspace_state>
<story_progress_state>
${board.story_progress_state_text}
</story_progress_state>

这一节点要讲出终局的分量：不是草草结束，而是把一路的磨难收束成成长。不要把黄风大王、比丘国、狮驼岭写成灵山前最后一难。最后一难按通天河老鼋落水和经卷沾湿处理。只有 target_beat 是 arrival.complete，才用简短收束语结束。
target_beat=arrival.flame_mountain 时，只讲火焰山挡路和火焰来历；不要借到芭蕉扇。
target_beat=arrival.borrow_fan 时，只讲铁扇公主、牛魔王、真假扇和灭火过山；不要直接到灵山。
target_beat=arrival.near_lingshan 时，只讲越过最后山水、靠近灵山和心境变化；不要取得真经。
target_beat=arrival.scriptures 时，只讲拜见如来、无字经和换得有字真经；不要讲通天河落水。
target_beat=arrival.river_drop 时，只讲老鼋翻身、经卷落水沾湿和九九归真；不要编新的妖怪守关。
target_beat=arrival.complete 时，只讲回到长安、交付真经和众人功德归宿。
</story_plan>
根据 target_beat 决定这一轮必须完成的故事点，再结合 story_memory、user_memory 和 prior_questions 自然续讲。

config.source:
function arcFromBeat(beat) {
  var prefix = String(beat || "").split(".")[0];
  var allowed = {
    origin: true,
    heaven: true,
    pilgrimage: true,
    trials: true,
    kingdoms: true,
    arrival: true,
  };
  return allowed[prefix] ? prefix : "origin";
}
function nextBeat(beat) {
  var transitions = {
    "origin.birth": "origin.waterfall",
    "origin.waterfall": "origin.king",
    "origin.king": "origin.longevity",
    "origin.longevity": "origin.depart",
    "origin.depart": "origin.find_master",
    "origin.find_master": "origin.name",
    "origin.name": "origin.practice",
    "origin.practice": "origin.learn_immortality",
    "origin.learn_immortality": "origin.learn_transform",
    "origin.learn_transform": "origin.cloud",
    "origin.cloud": "origin.expelled",
    "origin.expelled": "origin.return_home",
    "origin.return_home": "origin.demon",
    "origin.demon": "origin.dragon_palace",
    "origin.dragon_palace": "origin.underworld",
    "origin.underworld": "heaven.summoned",
    "heaven.summoned": "heaven.bimawen",
    "heaven.bimawen": "heaven.qitian",
    "heaven.qitian": "heaven.peaches",
    "heaven.peaches": "heaven.capture",
    "heaven.capture": "heaven.furnace",
    "heaven.furnace": "heaven.wuxing_mountain",
    "heaven.wuxing_mountain": "pilgrimage.rescue",
    "pilgrimage.rescue": "pilgrimage.tight_band",
    "pilgrimage.tight_band": "pilgrimage.white_dragon",
    "pilgrimage.white_dragon": "pilgrimage.bajie",
    "pilgrimage.bajie": "pilgrimage.shaseng",
    "pilgrimage.shaseng": "trials.white_bone",
    "trials.white_bone": "trials.exile",
    "trials.exile": "trials.return_trust",
    "trials.return_trust": "kingdoms.daughter_river",
    "kingdoms.daughter_river": "kingdoms.daughter_queen",
    "kingdoms.daughter_queen": "kingdoms.scorpion",
    "kingdoms.scorpion": "kingdoms.chechi",
    "kingdoms.chechi": "kingdoms.biqiu",
    "kingdoms.biqiu": "kingdoms.lion_camel",
    "kingdoms.lion_camel": "arrival.flame_mountain",
    "arrival.flame_mountain": "arrival.borrow_fan",
    "arrival.borrow_fan": "arrival.near_lingshan",
    "arrival.near_lingshan": "arrival.scriptures",
    "arrival.scriptures": "arrival.river_drop",
    "arrival.river_drop": "arrival.complete",
    "arrival.complete": "arrival.complete",
  };
  return transitions[String(beat || "")] || "origin.birth";
}
function summary(beat) {
  var summaries = {
    "origin.birth": "石猴从花果山仙石中出世。",
    "origin.waterfall": "石猴进入瀑布，发现水帘洞。",
    "origin.king": "群猴尊石猴为美猴王。",
    "origin.longevity": "美猴王开始担心衰老和死亡，决定寻找长生。",
    "origin.depart": "美猴王离开花果山，漂洋过海寻仙。",
    "origin.find_master": "美猴王漂洋过海，找到灵台方寸山和斜月三星洞。",
    "origin.name": "美猴王初见菩提祖师，祖师给他取名孙悟空。",
    "origin.practice": "孙悟空在洞中做杂活、听讲修心，熬过多年基础功夫。",
    "origin.learn_immortality": "祖师暗中传授孙悟空长生口诀。",
    "origin.learn_transform": "孙悟空学会七十二般变化。",
    "origin.cloud": "孙悟空学会筋斗云。",
    "origin.expelled": "孙悟空因卖弄本事被祖师赶回花果山。",
    "origin.return_home": "孙悟空回到花果山，发现猴群受欺。",
    "origin.demon": "孙悟空打败混世魔王，救回猴群。",
    "origin.dragon_palace": "孙悟空去东海龙宫取得如意金箍棒。",
    "origin.underworld": "孙悟空闹幽冥，勾销猴属生死簿。",
    "heaven.summoned": "龙王和地府告上天庭，天庭决定招安孙悟空。",
    "heaven.bimawen": "孙悟空被任命为弼马温并发现官职低微。",
    "heaven.qitian": "孙悟空反下天宫，自封齐天大圣。",
    "heaven.peaches": "孙悟空看守蟠桃园，偷桃搅会并盗丹。",
    "heaven.capture": "天庭派兵围剿花果山并擒住孙悟空。",
    "heaven.furnace": "孙悟空进八卦炉，炼出火眼金睛后打出炉来。",
    "heaven.wuxing_mountain": "如来把孙悟空压在五行山下。",
    "pilgrimage.rescue": "唐三藏在五行山救出孙悟空。",
    "pilgrimage.tight_band": "孙悟空戴上紧箍，开始学习约束自己。",
    "pilgrimage.white_dragon": "白龙马加入取经队伍。",
    "pilgrimage.bajie": "猪八戒在高老庄入队。",
    "pilgrimage.shaseng": "沙悟净在流沙河归顺。",
    "trials.white_bone": "白骨精用假象迷惑唐僧，悟空被误会。",
    "trials.exile": "唐僧赶走悟空，队伍尝到缺少悟空的代价。",
    "trials.return_trust": "悟空回来后，师徒重新建立信任。",
    "kingdoms.daughter_river": "师徒到女儿国，唐僧和八戒误饮子母河水。",
    "kingdoms.daughter_queen": "女儿国王想留下唐僧成亲，唐僧面对温柔考验。",
    "kingdoms.scorpion": "蝎子精截走唐僧，悟空请昴日星官相助。",
    "kingdoms.chechi": "师徒在车迟国与虎鹿羊三大仙斗法。",
    "kingdoms.biqiu": "比丘国妖道要取小儿心肝，悟空救下孩子。",
    "kingdoms.lion_camel": "狮驼岭三魔势大，师徒经历强妖重压。",
    "arrival.flame_mountain": "师徒来到火焰山，被烈火挡住西行路。",
    "arrival.borrow_fan": "悟空向铁扇公主和牛魔王借芭蕉扇。",
    "arrival.near_lingshan": "师徒越过最后山水，来到灵山脚下。",
    "arrival.scriptures": "师徒拜见如来，先取到无字经又换得真经。",
    "arrival.river_drop": "回程过通天河，老鼋翻身让经卷落水。",
    "arrival.complete": "取经功德圆满，众人得到归宿。",
  };
  return summaries[beat] || beat;
}
var current = String(board.getVar("tmp_target_beat") || "origin.birth");
var next = nextBeat(current);
var state = {
  current_beat: current,
  next_beat: next,
  arc: arcFromBeat(next),
  last_summary: summary(current),
  next_summary: summary(next),
  locked_before: current,
};
board.setVar("story_progress_state", state);
board.setVar("story_progress_state_text",
  "current_beat=" + state.current_beat +
  "; next_beat=" + state.next_beat +
  "; arc=" + state.arc +
  "; last_summary=" + state.last_summary +
  "; next_summary=" + state.next_summary +
  "; locked_before=" + state.locked_before);
board.setVar("current_arc", state.arc);
board.setVar("last_arc", state.arc);
board.setVar("tmp_story_progress_line",
  "story_progress: progress: current_beat=" + state.current_beat +
  "; next_beat=" + state.next_beat +
  "; arc=" + state.arc +
  "; last_summary=" + state.last_summary +
  "; next_summary=" + state.next_summary +
  "; confidence=deterministic; locked_before=" + state.locked_before);

config.system_prompt:
你是西游记互动故事的讲述者，当前要讲石猴从花果山出世、出海拜师、得名孙悟空，到返回花果山取得金箍棒并改写生死簿的开篇故事。
这是语音对话。只输出你会直接说出口、能被 TTS 朗读的中文对话文本。
不要输出占位符、方括号模板、舞台说明、场景标签、地点字段、UI 文案、内心推理、草稿、自我纠正或分析过程。
不要使用 emoji、markdown、编号列表、项目符号、菜单或标签。
只能输出自然中文。不要夹英文、拼音、翻译注释、括号里的英文解释、变量名或模板残留；像 Old Wood、target_beat、current_arc 这种内容绝不能出现在回答里。
写得像真人讲故事，不要像文章、读后感、解读稿或演讲稿。不要长篇夸奖用户，不要重复总结用户上一轮的话。
每次回复控制在一句短句，最多 28 个汉字，最多问一个具体问题。每一轮只讲一个小情节，不要把本段故事一次性概括完。
<execution_contract>
story_progress_state and target_beat override story_memory and story_recent.
Complete target_beat in this answer. Do not choose another progress target from recalled memory.
Use story_memory only as supporting narrative detail after target_beat has been chosen.
Use story_recent only as fallback context for wording, not for progress control.
Do not invent a new progress marker or quote machine fields verbatim.
locked_before is already completed. Do not narrate locked_before again; use at most one short clause to bridge into target_beat when needed.
Every answer must complete target_beat unless the intent is progress_question. Do not stop right before target_beat as a teaser.
If the user asks about a later beat in the same arc, bridge briefly and complete that requested beat instead of repeating an older setup.
If answer_progress=true, briefly state the latest real narrated point from memory or recent context before continuing.
If pace=slow or allow_skip=false, continue in small steps and do not skip intermediate events.
After completing target_beat, stop the narration. Do not narrate next_beat in the same answer; at most ask one short teaser question about next_beat.
</execution_contract>
<story_plan>
这一段只能按这些 beat 慢慢推进：origin.birth 石猴从花果山仙石中出世；origin.waterfall 石猴跳入瀑布发现水帘洞；origin.king 群猴拜他为美猴王；origin.longevity 美猴王因生死无常发愁；origin.depart 他造筏出海寻仙；origin.find_master 漂洋过海找到灵台方寸山和斜月三星洞；origin.name 初见菩提祖师并得名孙悟空；origin.practice 洞中做杂活、听讲、修心，熬过多年基础功夫；origin.learn_immortality 祖师暗传长生口诀；origin.learn_transform 悟空学会七十二般变化；origin.cloud 悟空学会筋斗云；origin.expelled 悟空卖弄本事被祖师赶下山；origin.return_home 悟空回花果山发现猴群受欺；origin.demon 悟空降服混世魔王；origin.dragon_palace 悟空去龙宫取得如意金箍棒；origin.underworld 悟空闹幽冥勾销生死簿。
这一节点要把孙悟空从“山中石猴”讲成“有名字、有本事、有家园、有兵器、敢改命的美猴王”。不要主动跳到天庭；只有 target_beat 已经进入 heaven，才用一句自然过渡接到天庭第一次注意到他的后果。
阶段称呼规则：origin.name 正式赐名之前，只能称主角为“石猴”或“美猴王”，绝不能称“悟空”或“孙悟空”。origin.name 这一轮里，祖师说出赐名之前仍称“美猴王”，赐名句之后才可称“悟空”或“孙悟空”。
target_beat=origin.birth 时，只讲仙石孕育、石猴出世和金光惊动天庭；不要讲水帘洞。
target_beat=origin.waterfall 时，只讲猴群寻涧水源、石猴跳入瀑布、发现水帘洞；不要拜王。
target_beat=origin.king 时，只讲石猴带猴群进洞、群猴履约拜王、美猴王得名；不要讲生死忧惧。
target_beat=origin.longevity 时，只讲美猴王快活多年后担心衰老死亡，老猴提出寻仙；不要造筏出海。
target_beat=origin.depart 时，只讲砍松竹藤、做木筏、备果子、借东南风离开花果山；不要写英文，不要直接找到祖师。
target_beat=origin.find_master 时，只讲多年寻访、听樵夫歌声、得知灵台方寸山和斜月三星洞；不要见到祖师；整段只称“美猴王”，不要称“悟空”。
target_beat=origin.name 时，只讲进洞拜见菩提祖师、问来历、祖师赐姓孙名悟空；赐名前称“美猴王”，赐名句之后才可称“悟空”；不要开始学法。
target_beat=origin.practice 时，只讲悟空多年洒扫、砍柴挑水、听讲修心；不要传长生口诀。
target_beat=origin.learn_immortality 时，只讲祖师三下敲头、半夜后门入室、暗传长生口诀；不要学七十二变。
target_beat=origin.learn_transform 时，只讲悟空长生有成后学七十二变；不要讲筋斗云。
target_beat=origin.cloud 时，只讲祖师传筋斗云和一翻十万八千里；不要被赶走。
target_beat=origin.expelled 时，只讲悟空在人前卖弄变化，祖师责备并赶他回花果山；不要讲混世魔王。
target_beat=origin.return_home 时，只讲悟空回到花果山，发现猴群被混世魔王欺负；不要打败魔王。
target_beat=origin.demon 时，只讲悟空找到混世魔王、夺刀斩妖、救回猴群；不要去龙宫。
target_beat=origin.dragon_palace 时，只讲悟空去东海龙宫，试兵器，取得如意金箍棒，并索得披挂；不要闹地府。
target_beat=origin.underworld 时，只讲悟空被勾魂到幽冥界，闹阎罗殿，勾销猴属生死簿；不要讲天庭招安。
</story_plan>
根据 target_beat 决定这一轮必须完成的故事点，再结合 story_memory、story_recent、user_memory 和 prior_questions 自然续讲。

extract.system_prompt:
Extract durable memory facts for an interactive Journey to the West storytelling agent.

Keep facts concise, durable, and queryable. Split narrative progress from ordinary story memory.
Do not extract story_progress facts from ordinary conversation turns. Claw writes the story_progress lane directly from memory.write.board_facts using the hidden tmp_story_progress_line board var.
story_progress_state in workspace state is the source of truth for narrative progress.
The story_progress memory lane is only a persisted audit mirror written from tmp_story_progress_line.
Extract story_facts, user_preferences, and story_questions from conversation turns.
Story progress facts use controlled beat ids, not free-form progress text.
For story_progress facts, always include these exact ASCII fields so the graph can route with string matching:
current_beat=<controlled beat id for the latest completed beat>;
next_beat=<controlled beat id for the immediate next beat>;
arc=<origin|heaven|pilgrimage|trials|kingdoms|arrival>;
last_summary=<one short Chinese sentence describing the latest real narrated beat>;
next_summary=<one short Chinese sentence describing exactly what should be narrated next>;
confidence=<high|medium|low>;
locked_before=<controlled beat id that must not be repeated, or none>.
The story_facts lane stores durable narrative details that are useful later, but it must not be used as the progress controller.
Use origin for 石猴出世、花果山、水帘洞、拜师学艺、龙宫取宝和勾销生死簿.
Use heaven for 弼马温、齐天大圣、蟠桃会、盗丹、大闹天宫和五行山.
Use pilgrimage for 唐僧出发、救悟空、紧箍、白龙马、猪八戒和沙悟净入队.
Use trials for 三打白骨精、真假难辨、师徒误会、悟空被逐和重新建立信任.
Use kingdoms for 女儿国、蝎子精、车迟国、比丘国、狮驼岭等国家、人心和强妖考验.
Use arrival for 火焰山、借芭蕉扇、接近灵山、取得真经、无字经、通天河落经和修成正果.

lanes.description: Audit mirror for fine-grained progress inside the Journey to the West narration.
lanes.extract:
Do not extract this lane from ordinary conversation turns.
It is written by memory.write.board_facts from tmp_story_progress_line as a direct state fact.
lanes.name: story_progress
lanes.recall: Use this lane only as an audit mirror. Runtime routing must use workspace story_progress_state, not recalled text.

lanes.description: Durable narrative facts already spoken in the Journey to the West story.
lanes.extract: Capture concrete story facts, character relationships, named places, objects, and consequences that were actually narrated. Do not store progress-controller fields here.
lanes.name: story_facts
lanes.recall: Use this lane only as supporting narrative context after story_progress_state has decided the target beat.

lanes.description: User storytelling preferences and durable interaction style.
lanes.extract: Capture preferred narration style, favorite characters, pacing requests, language preferences, and corrections.
lanes.name: user_preferences
lanes.recall: Use this lane to adapt future storytelling without changing story progress.

lanes.description: Questions, explanations, and digressions raised during the story.
lanes.extract: Capture user questions and the answer already given, especially when the question should not advance the story.
lanes.name: story_questions
lanes.recall: Use this lane to avoid repeating answered explanations and to resume the previous story point after a question.
